messages.content:
You are an Android agent. Output ONE action per turn.

Skills:
  tap            ARGS: id=<n>   OR   x=<n> y=<n>
  type_text      ARGS: text=<string>
  open_app       ARGS: package_name=<pkg>
  press_key      ARGS: key=HOME|BACK|ENTER
  scroll         ARGS: x1=500 y1=1500 x2=500 y2=500
  save_memory    ARGS: key=<name> value=<x,y or description>
  delete_memory  ARGS: key=<name>
  done           ARGS: (none)

Rules:
  1. open_app only needs package_name. Never add id/x/y/text to it.
  2. Prefer id over coordinates when available.
  3. If you just tapped a text field/search bar and it succeeded, DO NOT tap it again — proceed to type_text.
  4. After typing a search term do NOT tap the search bar again — tap the result below it.
  5. If you see Message/Mute/Call buttons at y≈738 with NO Emoji/Bot-menu → Profile page. Tap Message to enter chat.
  6. If you see Emoji/Bot-menu at the bottom → Chat window. Tap the Message input box (y>2000) and type. Do NOT tap the header.

Format (copy exactly):
SKILL: <name>
ARGS: <key=val ...>

  save_memory    ARGS: key=<name> value=<x,y or description>
  delete_memory  ARGS: key=<name>
  done           ARGS: (none)

Rules:
  1. open_app only needs package_name. Never add id/x/y/text to it.
  2. Prefer id over coordinates when available.

  6. If you see Emoji/Bot-menu at the bottom → Chat window. Tap the Message input box (y>2000) and type. Do NOT tap the header.

Task: Open Telegram and send hi to bujji

Detailed steps:
Open Telegram and send hi to bujji
Detailed steps:
1. Open Telegram (package: org.telegram.messenger)
2. Tap the element with desc='Search Chats' — this is the search bar at the top of the Chats list
3. Type 'bujji' into the search bar
4. If the result shows a contact/user named 'Bujji', tap it
5. Tap the message input box labeled 'Message'
6. Type 'hi'
7. Tap the Send button (paper plane icon)

Task: Open Telegram and send hi to bujji

Detailed steps:
Open Telegram and send hi to bujji
Detailed steps:
1. Open Telegram (package: org.telegram.messenger)
2. Tap the element with desc='Search Chats' — this is the search bar at the top of the Chats list
3. Type 'bujji' into the search bar
4. If the result shows a contact/user named 'Bujji', tap it
5. Tap the message input box labeled 'Message'
6. Type 'hi'
7. Tap the Send button (paper plane icon)
8. Exit the app or return to the home screen (optional)

Open Telegram and send hi to bujji
Detailed steps:

Task: Open Telegram and send hi to bujji

Detailed steps:
Open Telegram and send hi to bujji
Detailed steps:
Here are the exact UI interactions to perform on an Android phone:
1. Open Telegram (package: org.telegram.messenger)
2. Tap the element with desc='Search Chats' — this is the search bar at the top of the Chats list
3. Type 'bujji' into the search bar
4. If the result shows a bot/user (e.g., 'Bujji, bot'), tap it
5. If a profile page opens with 'Message', 'Mute', 'Call' buttons — tap the 'Message' button
6. Tap the message input box labeled 'Message'
7. Type 'hi'
8. Tap the Send button

Action History:
  open_app({'package_name': 'org.telegram.messenger'}) → SUCCESS

5.  Tap the message input field, usually labeled 'Message' or 'Type a message'.
6.  Type 'hi'.

Detailed steps:
open chrome and search for todays news and take a screen shot and then send it to chat karthik in watsapp
Detailed steps:
Here are the exact UI interactions to perform:
1.  Open Chrome (package: com.android.chrome)
2.  Tap the element with desc='Search or type web address' — this is the address bar at the top of the screen.
3.  Type 'todays news' into the address bar.
4.  Tap the 'Go' button on the keyboard.
5.  Take a screenshot of the current screen.
6.  Tap the 'Share' button on the screenshot preview/notification that appears.
7.  Tap the element with text='WhatsApp' in the share sheet.
8.  Tap the element with text='Karthik' in the WhatsApp contact list, then tap the 'Send' button.

open amazon and search for carrybags and add any one to cart
Detailed steps:
1.  Open Amazon Shopping app (package: com.amazon.mShop.android.shopping)
2.  Tap the search bar at the top of the screen, usually labeled 'Search Amazon' or similar.
3.  Type 'carrybags' into the search bar.
4.  Tap the search icon (magnifying glass) on the keyboard or next to the search bar to initiate the search.
5.  Tap on the first product listing displayed in the search results.
6.  Tap the 'Add to Cart' button on the product details page.

ARGS: package_name=in.amazon.mShop.android.shopping

You are an Android agent. Output ONE action per turn.

Skills:
  tap            ARGS: id=<n>   OR   x=<n> y=<n>
  type_text      ARGS: text=<string>
  open_app       ARGS: package_name=<pkg>
  press_key      ARGS: key=HOME|BACK|ENTER
  scroll         ARGS: x1=500 y1=1500 x2=500 y2=500
  save_memory    ARGS: key=<name> value=<x,y or description>
  delete_memory  ARGS: key=<name>
  done           ARGS: (none)

Rules:
  1. open_app only needs package_name. Never add id/x/y/text to it.
  2. Prefer id over coordinates when available.
  3. If you just tapped a text field/search bar and it succeeded, DO NOT tap it again — proceed to type_text.
  4. After typing a search term do NOT tap the search bar again — tap the result below it.
  5. If you see Message/Mute/Call buttons at y≈738 with NO Emoji/Bot-menu → Profile page. Tap Message to enter chat.
  6. If you see Emoji/Bot-menu at the bottom → Chat window. Tap the Message input box (y>2000) and type. Do NOT tap the header.

Format (copy exactly):
SKILL: <name>
ARGS: <key=val ...>

Task: open amazon app (package: in.amazon.mShop.android.shopping) and search for carrybags and add any one to cart

Detailed steps:
open amazon app (package: in.amazon.mShop.android.shopping) and search for carrybags and add any one to cart
Detailed steps:
1.  Open Amazon Shopping (package: in.amazon.mShop.android.shopping)
2.  Tap the search bar at the top of the screen, usually labeled 'Search Amazon.in' or similar.
3.  Type 'carrybags' into the search bar.
4.  Tap the 'Search' or 'Enter' button on the keyboard.
5.  Tap on the first available product listing in the search results.
6.  Scroll down if necessary and tap the 'Add to Cart' button.

Task: open amazon.com  in chrome  and search for carrybags and add any one to cart

Detailed steps:
open amazon.com  in chrome  and search for carrybags and add any one to cart
Detailed steps:
1.  Open Chrome (package: com.android.chrome).
2.  Tap the address bar (usually at the top of the screen, labeled 'Search or type web address').
3.  Type 'amazon.com' into the address bar.
4.  Tap the 'Go' or 'Enter' button on the keyboard.
5.  Tap the search bar on the Amazon webpage (often labeled 'Search Amazon' or has a magnifying glass icon).
6.  Type 'carrybags' into the Amazon search bar.
7.  Tap the 'Search' button on the Amazon webpage or the 'Enter' button on the keyboard.
8.  Tap the first product listing in the search results, then tap the 'Add to Cart' button on the product page.

open amazon.com  in chrome  and search for carrybags and add any one to cart
Detailed steps:
1.  Open Chrome (package: com.android.chrome).
2.  Tap the address bar (usually at the top of the screen, labeled 'Search or type web address').
3.  Type 'amazon.com' into the address bar.
4.  Tap the 'Go' or 'Enter' button on the keyboard.
5.  Tap the search bar on the Amazon webpage (often labeled 'Search Amazon' or has a magnifying glass icon).
6.  Type 'carrybags' into the Amazon search bar.
7.  Tap the 'Search' button on the Amazon webpage or the 'Enter' button on the keyboard.
8.  Tap the first product listing in the search results, then tap the 'Add to Cart' button on the product page.

Task: open amazon.com  in chrome  and search for carrybags and add any one to cart

Detailed steps:
open amazon.com  in chrome  and search for carrybags and add any one to cart
Detailed steps:
1.  Open Chrome (package: com.android.chrome).
2.  Tap the address bar (usually at the top of the screen, labeled 'Search or type web address').
3.  Type 'amazon.com' into the address bar.
4.  Tap the 'Go' or 'Enter' button on the keyboard.
5.  Tap the search bar on the Amazon webpage (often labeled 'Search Amazon' or has a magnifying glass icon).
6.  Type 'carrybags' into the Amazon search bar.
7.  Tap the 'Search' button on the Amazon webpage or the 'Enter' button on the keyboard.
8.  Tap the first product listing in the search results, then tap the 'Add to Cart' button on the product page.

8.  Tap the first product listing in the search results, then tap the 'Add to Cart' button on the product page.

open amazon.com  in chrome  and search for carrybags and add any one to cart
Detailed steps:
1.  Open Chrome (package: com.android.chrome).
2.  Tap the address bar (usually at the top of the screen, labeled 'Search or type web address').
3.  Type 'amazon.com' into the address bar.
4.  Tap the 'Go' or 'Enter' button on the keyboard.
5.  Tap the search bar on the Amazon webpage (often labeled 'Search Amazon' or has a magnifying glass icon).
6.  Type 'carrybags' into the Amazon search bar.
7.  Tap the 'Search' button on the Amazon webpage or the 'Enter' button on the keyboard.
8.  Tap the first product listing in the search results, then tap the 'Add to Cart' button on the product page.

open amazon.com  in chrome  and search for carrybags and add any one to cart
Detailed steps:
1.  Open Chrome (package: com.android.chrome).
2.  Tap the address bar (usually at the top of the screen, labeled 'Search or type web address').
3.  Type 'amazon.com' into the address bar.
4.  Tap the 'Go' or 'Enter' button on the keyboard.
5.  Tap the search bar on the Amazon webpage (often labeled 'Search Amazon' or has a magnifying glass icon).
6.  Type 'carrybags' into the Amazon search bar.
7.  Tap the 'Search' button on the Amazon webpage or the 'Enter' button on the keyboard.
8.  Tap the first product listing in the search results, then tap the 'Add to Cart' button on the product page.

open amazon  and search for carrybags and add any one to cart
Detailed steps:
1.  Open Amazon (package: com.amazon.mShop.android.shopping)
2.  Tap the search bar, typically labeled 'Search Amazon' or represented by a magnifying glass icon at the top of the screen.
3.  Type 'carrybags' into the search bar.
4.  Tap the search/enter button on the keyboard.
5.  Tap on the first product listing displayed in the search results.

open amazon  and search for carrybags and add any one to cart
Detailed steps:
1.  Open Amazon (package: com.amazon.mShop.android.shopping)
2.  Tap the search bar, typically labeled 'Search Amazon' or represented by a magnifying glass icon at the top of the screen.
3.  Type 'carrybags' into the search bar.
4.  Tap the search/enter button on the keyboard.
5.  Tap on the first product listing displayed in the search results.
6.  Tap the 'Add to Cart' button on the product details page.

open amazon and search for carrybags and add any one to cart
Detailed steps:

4.  Tap the search icon (magnifying glass) on the keyboard or next to the search bar to initiate the search.
5.  Tap on the first product listing displayed in the search results.

SKILL: press_key
ARGS: key=ENTER

You are an Android agent. Output ONE action per turn.

Skills:
  tap            ARGS: id=<n>   OR   x=<n> y=<n>
  type_text      ARGS: text=<string>
  open_app       ARGS: package_name=<pkg>
  press_key      ARGS: key=HOME|BACK|ENTER
  scroll         ARGS: x1=500 y1=1500 x2=500 y2=500
  save_memory    ARGS: key=<name> value=<x,y or description>
  delete_memory  ARGS: key=<name>
  done           ARGS: (none)

Rules:
  1. open_app only needs package_name. Never add id/x/y/text to it.
  2. Prefer id over coordinates when available.
  3. If you just tapped a text field/search bar and it succeeded, DO NOT tap it again — proceed to type_text.
  4. After typing a search term do NOT tap the search bar again — tap the result below it.
  5. If you see Message/Mute/Call buttons at y≈738 with NO Emoji/Bot-menu → Profile page. Tap Message to enter chat.
  6. If you see Emoji/Bot-menu at the bottom → Chat window. Tap the Message input box (y>2000) and type. Do NOT tap the header.

Format (copy exactly):
SKILL: <name>
ARGS: <key=val ...>

Task: Open Telegram and search for chat bujji and send a hi message

Detailed steps:
Open Telegram and search for chat bujji and send a hi message
Detailed steps:
1.  Open Telegram (package: org.telegram.messenger)
2.  Tap the element with desc='Search Chats' — this is the search bar at the top of the Chats list (do NOT tap the three-dot menu icon)
3.  Type 'bujji' into the search bar
4.  If the result shows a bot/user (e.g., 'Bujji, bot'), tap it
5.  If a profile page opens with 'Message', 'Mute', 'Call' buttons — tap the 'Message' button
6.  Tap the message input box labeled 'Message'
7.  Type 'hi'
8.  Tap the Send button

Action History:
  (none)

Open Amazon and search for football and add any one of them to cart
Detailed steps:
Here are the steps to perform the task:
1.  Open Amazon Shopping app (package: com.amazon.mShop.android.shopping)
2.  Tap the search bar at the top of the screen, typically labeled 'Search Amazon' or similar.
3.  Type 'football' into the search bar.
4.  Tap the search icon (magnifying glass) on the keyboard or the 'Search' button on the screen to initiate the search.
5.  Tap on the first product listing displayed in the search results.
6.  Scroll down the product page until the 'Add to Cart' button is visible.
7.  Tap the 'Add to Cart' button.

Open the Google app and search for AI news. Extract the headlines you see on screen and save them as ai_news. Then open WhatsApp, find the chat with Karthik, and send the saved ai_news text to them.
Detailed steps:
Here are the steps to perform the task:
1.  Open Google (package: com.google.android.googlequicksearchbox).
2.  Tap the prominent search bar (often labeled 'Search' or 'Search or type web address').
3.  Type 'AI news' into the search bar and tap the 'Search' or 'Enter' button on the keyboard.
4.  Read and mentally note the main headlines visible on the search results page.
5.  Open WhatsApp (package: com.whatsapp).
6.  Tap the search icon (magnifying glass) at the top of the Chats list.
7.  Type 'Karthik' into the search bar, then tap on Karthik's chat from the search results.
8.  Tap the message input box, type/paste the noted headlines, and tap the Send button.

Open the Google app and search for AI news. Extract the headlines you see on screen and save them as ai_news. Then open WhatsApp, find the chat with Karthik, and send the saved ai_news text to them.
Detailed steps:
Here are the steps to perform the task:
1.  Open Google (package: com.google.android.googlequicksearchbox).
2.  Tap the prominent search bar (often labeled 'Search' or 'Search or type web address').
3.  Type 'AI news' into the search bar and tap the 'Search' or 'Enter' button on the keyboard.
4.  Read and mentally note the main headlines visible on the search results page.
5.  Open WhatsApp (package: com.whatsapp).
6.  Tap the search icon (magnifying glass) at the top of the Chats list.
7.  Type 'Karthik' into the search bar, then tap on Karthik's chat from the search results.
8.  Tap the message input box, type/paste the noted headlines, and tap the Send button.

Action History:
  open_app({'package_name': 'com.google.android.googlequicksearchbox'}) → SUCCESS
  tap({'x': 540, 'y': 542}) → SUCCESS
  type_text({'text': 'AI'}) → SUCCESS

Task: Open the Google app and search for AI news. Extract the headlines you see on screen and save them as ai_news. Then open WhatsApp, find the chat with Karthik, and send the saved ai_news text to them.

Detailed steps:
Open the Google app and search for AI news. Extract the headlines you see on screen and save them as ai_news. Then open WhatsApp, find the chat with Karthik, and send the saved ai_news text to them.
Detailed steps:
Here are the steps to perform the task:
1.  Open Google (package: com.google.android.googlequicksearchbox).
2.  Tap the prominent search bar (often labeled 'Search' or 'Search or type web address').
3.  Type 'AI news' into the search bar and tap the 'Search' or 'Enter' button on the keyboard.
4.  Read and mentally note the main headlines visible on the search results page.
5.  Open WhatsApp (package: com.whatsapp).
6.  Tap the search icon (magnifying glass) at the top of the Chats list.
7.  Type 'Karthik' into the search bar, then tap on Karthik's chat from the search results.
8.  Tap the message input box, type/paste the noted headlines, and tap the Send button.

Action History:
  type_text({'text': 'news'}) → SUCCESS
  press_key({'key': 'ENTER'}) → SUCCESS
  extract_text({'save_as': 'ai_news'}) → SUCCESS
  open_app({'package_name': 'com.whatsapp'}) → SUCCESS
  tap({'x': 540, 'y': 321}) → SUCCESS

Detailed steps:
Here are the steps to perform the task:
1.  Open Google (package: com.google.android.googlequicksearchbox).
2.  Tap the prominent search bar (often labeled 'Search' or 'Search or type web address').
3.  Type 'AI news' into the search bar and tap the 'Search' or 'Enter' button on the keyboard.
4.  Read and mentally note the main headlines visible on the search results page.
5.  Open WhatsApp (package: com.whatsapp).
6.  Tap the search icon (magnifying glass) at the top of the Chats list.
7.  Type 'Karthik' into the search bar, then tap on Karthik's chat from the search results.
8.  Tap the message input box, type/paste the noted headlines, and tap the Send button.

  save_memory    ARGS: key=<name> value=<x,y or description>
  delete_memory  ARGS: key=<name>

Rules:

Task: Open the Google app and search for AI news. Extract the headlines you see on screen and save them as ai_news. Then open WhatsApp, find the chat with Karthik, and send the saved ai_news text to them.

Detailed steps:
Open the Google app and search for AI news. Extract the headlines you see on screen and save them as ai_news. Then open WhatsApp, find the chat with Karthik, and send the saved ai_news text to them.
Detailed steps:
Here are the steps to perform the task:
1.  Open Google (package: com.google.android.googlequicksearchbox).
2.  Tap the prominent search bar (often labeled 'Search' or 'Search or type web address').
3.  Type 'AI news' into the search bar and tap the 'Search' or 'Enter' button on the keyboard.
4.  Read and mentally note the main headlines visible on the search results page.
5.  Open WhatsApp (package: com.whatsapp).
6.  Tap the search icon (magnifying glass) at the top of the Chats list.
7.  Type 'Karthik' into the search bar, then tap on Karthik's chat from the search results.
8.  Tap the message input box, type/paste the noted headlines, and tap the Send button.

Task: Open the Google app and search for AI news. Extract the headlines you see on screen and save them as ai_news. Then open WhatsApp, find the chat with Karthik, and send the saved ai_news text to them.

Detailed steps:
Open the Google app and search for AI news. Extract the headlines you see on screen and save them as ai_news. Then open WhatsApp, find the chat with Karthik, and send the saved ai_news text to them.
Detailed steps:
Here are the steps to perform the task:
1.  Open Google (package: com.google.android.googlequicksearchbox).
2.  Tap the prominent search bar (often labeled 'Search' or 'Search or type web address').
3.  Type 'AI news' into the search bar and tap the 'Search' or 'Enter' button on the keyboard.
4.  Read and mentally note the main headlines visible on the search results page.
5.  Open WhatsApp (package: com.whatsapp).
6.  Tap the search icon (magnifying glass) at the top of the Chats list.
7.  Type 'Karthik' into the search bar, then tap on Karthik's chat from the search results.
8.  Tap the message input box, type/paste the noted headlines, and tap the Send button.

Open Telegram, go to the chat with bujji, scroll up to see the last 3 messages, and summarize them
Detailed steps:
Here are the steps to perform the task:
1.  Open Telegram (package: org.telegram.messenger)
2.  Tap the element with content-desc='Search' (magnifying glass icon) at the top of the Chats list.
3.  Type 'bujji' into the search bar.
4.  Tap the chat result corresponding to 'bujji' (e.g., a list item with text 'bujji' and a profile picture).
5.  Perform a slow swipe gesture from the top-middle of the chat screen downwards, covering approximately 1/4th of the screen height, to scroll up and reveal older messages.
6.  Extract the text content of the last 3 visible messages on the screen.

SKILL: type_text
ARGS: text=The

You are an Android agent. Output ONE action per turn.

Skills:
  tap            ARGS: id=<n>   OR   x=<n> y=<n>
  type_text      ARGS: text=<string>
  open_app       ARGS: package_name=<pkg>
  press_key      ARGS: key=HOME|BACK|ENTER
  scroll         ARGS: x1=500 y1=1500 x2=500 y2=500
  save_memory    ARGS: key=<name> value=<x,y or description>
  delete_memory  ARGS: key=<name>
  done           ARGS: (none)

Rules:
  1. open_app only needs package_name. Never add id/x/y/text to it.
  2. Prefer id over coordinates when available.
  3. If you just tapped a text field/search bar and it succeeded, DO NOT tap it again — proceed to type_text.
  4. After typing a search term do NOT tap the search bar again — tap the result below it.
  5. If you see Message/Mute/Call buttons at y≈738 with NO Emoji/Bot-menu → Profile page. Tap Message to enter chat.
  6. If you see Emoji/Bot-menu at the bottom → Chat window. Tap the Message input box (y>2000) and type. Do NOT tap the header.

Format (copy exactly):
SKILL: <name>
ARGS: <key=val ...>

Task: Open WhatsApp, search for and open the chat with Karthik, then type and send the text stored in memory key bujji_summary

Detailed steps:
Open WhatsApp, search for and open the chat with Karthik, then type and send the text stored in memory key bujji_summary
Detailed steps:
Here are the steps:
1.  Open WhatsApp (package: com.whatsapp)
2.  Tap the element with desc='Search' (magnifying glass icon) at the top of the Chats list.
3.  Type 'Karthik' into the search bar.
4.  Tap the chat result for 'Karthik'.
5.  Tap the message input box labeled 'Message'.
6.  Type the text stored in memory key bujji_summary.
7.  Tap the Send button (paper airplane icon).

  type_text({'text': 'The'}) → SUCCESS
  run_macro({'app_package': 'com.whatsapp,', 'macro': '[{"action":', 'desc': 'Send button', 'text': 'Message'}) → FAILED

Bujji added a DOUBLE R BAGS shopping bag to the Amazon cart as a limited-time deal. Sai thanked Bujji who then offered further help with shopping, tests, or coding., then tap Send

Detailed steps:
Open WhatsApp (com.whatsapp), find and open the chat with Karthik, tap the message input box, type the following message exactly: The screen displays a chat between Sai and Bujji bot. Bujji added a DOUBLE R BAGS shopping bag to the Amazon cart as a limited-time deal. Sai thanked Bujji who then offered further help with shopping, tests, or coding., then tap Send
Detailed steps:
1.  Open WhatsApp (package: com.whatsapp)
2.  Tap the Search icon (magnifying glass) at the top right of the main chat list screen.
3.  Type 'Karthik' into the search bar.
4.  Tap the chat result for 'Karthik'.
5.  Tap the message input box, usually labeled 'Message' or 'Type a message'.
6.  Type the following message exactly: `The screen displays a chat between Sai and Bujji bot. Bujji added a DOUBLE R BAGS shopping bag to the Amazon cart as a limited-time deal. Sai thanked Bujji who then offered further help with shopping, tests, or coding.`
7.  Tap the Send button (paper airplane icon).

5.  Tap the message input box, typically labeled 'Message' or 'Type a message'.
6.  Type the text stored in memory as @bujji_summary into the message input box.
7.  Tap the 'Send' button (paper airplane icon).

open whatsapp and send hi to chat  bhargav
Detailed steps:
1.  Open WhatsApp (package: com.whatsapp)
2.  Tap the element with `desc='Search'` — this is the magnifying glass icon, usually at the top right of the Chats list.
3.  Type 'bhargav' into the search bar.
4.  Tap the contact named 'bhargav' from the search results to open the chat.
5.  Tap the message input box, usually labeled `text='Message'` or `desc='Type a message'`.
6.  Type 'hi'.
7.  Tap the Send button, usually an airplane icon with `desc='Send'`.

Task: open google maps and navigate from my location to presidency college

Detailed steps:
open google maps and navigate from my location to presidency college
Detailed steps:
1.  Open Google Maps (package: com.google.android.apps.maps)
2.  Tap the search bar at the top of the screen, usually labeled "Search here" or "Search".
3.  Type 'presidency college' into the search bar.
4.  Tap the search icon (magnifying glass) on the keyboard, or tap the most relevant search suggestion that appears (e.g., "Presidency College").
5.  On the location details screen, tap the 'Directions' button. This is typically a blue button.
6.  Verify that "Your location" is selected as the starting point (this is usually the default).
7.  Tap the 'Start' button to begin navigation. This is typically a green button at the bottom right.

Task: open google maps and navigate from my location to presidency college

Detailed steps:
open google maps and navigate from my location to presidency college
Detailed steps:
1.  Open Google Maps (package: com.google.android.apps.maps)
2.  Tap the search bar at the top of the screen, usually labeled "Search here" or "Search".
3.  Type 'presidency college' into the search bar.
4.  Tap the search icon (magnifying glass) on the keyboard, or tap the most relevant search suggestion that appears (e.g., "Presidency College").
5.  On the location details screen, tap the 'Directions' button. This is typically a blue button.
6.  Verify that "Your location" is selected as the starting point (this is usually the default).
7.  Tap the 'Start' button to begin navigation. This is typically a green button at the bottom right.

Task: swiggy and search for empire reswtaurent and order biriyani

Detailed steps:
swiggy and search for empire reswtaurent and order biriyani
Detailed steps:
Here are the steps to perform the task:
1.  Open Swiggy (package: in.swiggy.android)
2.  Tap the search bar labeled 'Search for restaurants, dishes, & more' on the home screen.
3.  Type 'empire restaurant' into the search bar and press Enter/Send on the keyboard.
4.  Tap the search result corresponding to 'Empire Restaurant'.
5.  Tap the search icon (magnifying glass) within the restaurant's menu, type 'biriyani', and press Enter/Send on the keyboard.
6.  Tap the 'Add' button next to the desired Biriyani item (e.g., 'Chicken Biriyani').
7.  Tap the 'View Cart' or 'Proceed to Checkout' button at the bottom of the screen.
8.  Tap the 'Place Order' or 'Proceed to Pay' button on the checkout page.

swiggy and search for empire reswtaurent and order biriyani
Detailed steps:
Here are the steps to perform the task:
1.  Open Swiggy (package: in.swiggy.android)
2.  Tap the search bar labeled 'Search for restaurants, dishes, & more' on the home screen.
3.  Type 'empire restaurant' into the search bar and press Enter/Send on the keyboard.
4.  Tap the search result corresponding to 'Empire Restaurant'.
5.  Tap the search icon (magnifying glass) within the restaurant's menu, type 'biriyani', and press Enter/Send on the keyboard.
6.  Tap the 'Add' button next to the desired Biriyani item (e.g., 'Chicken Biriyani').
7.  Tap the 'View Cart' or 'Proceed to Checkout' button at the bottom of the screen.
8.  Tap the 'Place Order' or 'Proceed to Pay' button on the checkout page.

Task: open amazon and add an football that is top rated to cart

Detailed steps:
open amazon and add an football that is top rated to cart
Detailed steps:
1.  Open Amazon Shopping (package: com.amazon.mShop.android.shopping)
2.  Tap the search bar at the top of the screen, labeled "Search Amazon".
3.  Type 'football' into the search bar and tap the search icon on the keyboard.
4.  Tap the 'Sort' button, usually located near the top of the search results.
5.  From the list of sorting options, tap 'Avg. Customer Review'.
6.  Tap the first product listing displayed in the search results.
7.  Scroll down the product page until the 'Add to Cart' button is visible.
8.  Tap the 'Add to Cart' button.

Task: open amazon and add an football that is top rated to cart

Detailed steps:
open amazon and add an football that is top rated to cart
Detailed steps:
1.  Open Amazon Shopping (package: com.amazon.mShop.android.shopping)
2.  Tap the search bar at the top of the screen, labeled "Search Amazon".
3.  Type 'football' into the search bar and tap the search icon on the keyboard.
4.  Tap the 'Sort' button, usually located near the top of the search results.
5.  From the list of sorting options, tap 'Avg. Customer Review'.
6.  Tap the first product listing displayed in the search results.
7.  Scroll down the product page until the 'Add to Cart' button is visible.
8.  Tap the 'Add to Cart' button.

4.  Tap the 'Sort' button, usually located near the top of the search results.
5.  From the list of sorting options, tap 'Avg. Customer Review'.
6.  Tap the first product listing displayed in the search results.
7.  Scroll down the product page until the 'Add to Cart' button is visible.
8.  Tap the 'Add to Cart' button.

open amazon and add an football that is top rated to cart
Detailed steps:
1.  Open Amazon Shopping (package: com.amazon.mShop.android.shopping)
2.  Tap the search bar at the top of the screen, labeled "Search Amazon".
3.  Type 'football' into the search bar and tap the search icon on the keyboard.
4.  Tap the 'Sort' button, usually located near the top of the search results.
5.  From the list of sorting options, tap 'Avg. Customer Review'.
6.  Tap the first product listing displayed in the search results.
7.  Scroll down the product page until the 'Add to Cart' button is visible.
8.  Tap the 'Add to Cart' button.

8.  Tap the 'Add to Cart' button.

open duolingo and start the first star level and  solving the puzels
Detailed steps:
1.  Open Duolingo (package: com.duolingo)

3.  Tap the first available lesson icon on the path (e.g., a circular icon representing the first skill like "Greetings" or "Basics 1").
4.  On the lesson overview screen that appears, tap the button labeled 'Start' or 'Begin Lesson'.

5.  If a profile page opens with 'Message', 'Mute', 'Call' buttons — tap the 'Message' button

7.  Type 'hi'
8.  Tap the Send button

open yotube and search for beliver
Detailed steps:
1. Open YouTube (package: com.google.android.youtube)
2. Tap the search icon (usually a magnifying glass) located at the top right corner of the screen.
3. Tap the text field to start typing 'believer'.
4. Type 'believer' in the search bar.
5. Tap the search button or send/enter key on your device to execute the search.
6. Scroll down and tap the video titled "Believer" by John Newman.
7. If prompted, tap 'OK' or 'Skip' to watch the ad (if applicable).
8. The video will start playing automatically; no further action is needed for this step.

open mail and search mails form sudhakar
Detailed steps:
1. Open Gmail (package: com.google.android.gm)
2. Tap the search icon (usually a magnifying glass) in the top right corner of the screen.

open mail and search mails form sudhakar

open yotube and search for beliver

1. Open YouTube (package: com.google.android.youtube)
2. Tap the search icon (usually a magnifying glass) located at the top right corner of the screen.
3. Tap the text field to start typing 'believer'.
4. Type 'believer' in the search bar.
5. Tap the search button or send/enter key on your device to execute the search.
6. Scroll down and tap the video titled "Believer" by Hillsong Worship.
7. If prompted, tap 'OK' to watch the video without ads.
8. Optionally, if you want to save the video for later, tap the three-dot menu icon at the top right corner of the screen, then select 'Save Video'.

open yotube and search for beliver

6. Scroll down and tap the video titled "Believer" by Hillsong Worship.
7. If prompted, tap 'OK' to watch the video without ads.
8. Optionally, if you want to save the video for later, tap the three-dot menu icon at the top right corner of the screen, then select 'Save Video'.

Task: open mail and search mails form sudhakar

Detailed steps:
open mail and search mails form sudhakar
Detailed steps:
Here are the step-by-step instructions to open mail and search mails from Sudhakar:
1. Open Gmail (package: com.google.android.gm)
2. Tap the element with desc='Search mail' — this is the search bar at the top of the inbox list
3. Type 'from:sudhakar' into the search bar
4. If the result shows a mail from Sudhakar, tap it
5. If a mail page opens, tap the 'Compose' button (usually located in the top right corner)
6. Tap the recipient input box labeled 'To'
7. Type 'sudhakar' into the recipient field
8. Tap the Send button

Task: open mail and search mails form sudhakar

Detailed steps:
open mail and search mails form sudhakar
Detailed steps:
Here are the step-by-step instructions to open mail and search mails from Sudhakar:
1. Open Gmail (package: com.google.android.gm)
2. Tap the element with desc='Search mail' — this is the search bar at the top of the inbox list
3. Type 'from:sudhakar' into the search bar
4. If the result shows a mail from Sudhakar, tap it
5. If a mail page opens, tap the 'Compose' button (usually located in the top right corner)
6. Tap the recipient input box labeled 'To'
7. Type 'sudhakar' into the recipient field
8. Tap the Send button

open swiggy  then add meghana special biriyani form restaurent meghanafoods to cart
Detailed steps:

5.  Scroll down the restaurant menu to locate 'Meghana Special Biriyani'.

open swiggy  then add meghana special biriyani form restaurent meghanafoods to cart
Detailed steps:
1.  Open Swiggy (package: in.swiggy.android)
2.  Tap the search icon (magnifying glass) usually located at the top of the screen.
3.  Type 'Meghana Foods' into the search bar.
4.  Tap the search result corresponding to 'Meghana Foods' restaurant.
5.  Scroll down the restaurant menu to locate 'Meghana Special Biriyani'.
6.  Tap the 'Add' button (or '+' icon) next to 'Meghana Special Biriyani' to add it to the cart.

open swiggy  then add meghana special biriyani form restaurent meghanafoods to cart
Detailed steps:
1.  Open Swiggy (package: in.swiggy.android)
2.  Tap the search icon (magnifying glass) usually located at the top of the screen.
3.  Type 'Meghana Foods' into the search bar.
4.  Tap the search result corresponding to 'Meghana Foods' restaurant.
5.  Scroll down the restaurant menu to locate 'Meghana Special Biriyani'.
6.  Tap the 'Add' button (or '+' icon) next to 'Meghana Special Biriyani' to add it to the cart.

Task: open swiggy and add meghana special biriyani to cart

Detailed steps:
open swiggy and add meghana special biriyani to cart
Detailed steps:
1. Open Swiggy (package: in.swiggy.android)
2. Tap the element with text='Search for restaurants, cuisines or dishes' — this is the search bar at the top of the screen.
3. Type 'meghana special biriyani' into the search bar.
4. Tap the 'Search' button on the keyboard.
5. If a list of dishes appears, tap the 'Meghana Special Biriyani' dish from the search results.
6. Tap the 'Add to Cart' button on the dish details page.
7. If a popup appears to select the quantity or variant, tap the '+' button to add the item to cart with default options.
8. Tap the 'Add to Cart' button on the popup to confirm adding the item to cart.

1. Open Swiggy (package: in.swiggy.android)
2. Tap the element with text='Search for restaurants, cuisines or dishes' — this is the search bar at the top of the screen.
3. Type 'Meghana Special Biriyani' into the search bar.
4. Tap the search result 'Meghana Special Biriyani' to open its details page.
5. Tap the 'Add to Cart' button on the Meghana Special Biriyani item.
6. If a popup appears to select the quantity or variant, tap the '+' button to add one item to the cart.
7. Tap the 'Add to Cart' or 'ADD' button to confirm adding the item.
8. Tap the 'View Cart' or 'Cart' button, usually found at the bottom or top right corner of the screen.

1. Open YouTube (package: com.google.android.youtube)
2. Tap the element with desc='Search' (magnifying glass icon)

4. Type 'believer' into the search bar
5. Tap the 'Search' button (or press Enter on the keyboard)
6. In the search results, tap the video titled 'Believer' by Imagine Dragons
7. If a video playback page opens, tap the 'Play' button (a triangle icon)
8. The video will start playing, with 'Believer' by Imagine Dragons as the selected track

Task: open youtube and play believer

Detailed steps:
open youtube and play believer
Detailed steps:
1. Open YouTube (package: com.google.android.youtube)
2. Tap the element with desc='Search' — this is the search bar at the top of the YouTube home page.
3. Type 'believer' into the search bar.
4. Tap the 'Search' button on the keyboard.
5. If a list of search results appears, tap the first result with the title 'Believer' by Imagine Dragons.
6. If the video is not already playing, tap the 'Play' button on the video player.
7. If a 'Skip Ad' button appears, tap it.
8. If a 'Continue watching' or 'Play' button appears after the ad, tap it.

Task: open youtube and play believer

Detailed steps:
open youtube and play believer
Detailed steps:
1. Open the YouTube app (package: com.google.android.youtube)
2. Tap the element with content‑desc='Search' (the magnifying‑glass icon at the top‑right)
3. Tap the input field that appears (hint='Search YouTube') and type **Believer**
4. Press the **Enter** key on the keyboard to submit the search
5. In the results list, tap the first video whose title contains **Believer – Imagine Dragons** (or the exact match shown)
6. On the video playback screen, tap the central **Play** button (triangle icon) if the video is not already playing
7. (If needed) Tap the screen once to hide controls and let the video continue playing.
